sprint: Atmosphere Engine V1 (MLAS) — Temporary Audio Mixer Tool
task: A real, user-requested need: "expose the mixture controls for sometime. i need to set right volume, tones, fades" -- since FOUNDATION_LAYERS' own placeholder mix has been flagged as needing tuning by ear since the AudioManager implementation first shipped, with no way to hear or adjust it live until now. js/audioManager.js gained an additive-only mixing-console API -- getFoundationLayers(), setLayerVolume(file,vol)/getLayerVolume(file), setWorldFadeMs(ms)/getWorldFadeMs(), setMuteFadeMs(ms)/getMuteFadeMs() -- nothing here changes what any pre-existing caller does, confirmed via full regression that the main app's boot-time AudioManager state is byte-identical to before. New tools/audio-mixer/ (mirroring tools/platform-status/'s own developer-utility precedent, not a Builder/Studio feature, no in-app link): a Master Volume/Mute section, a live slider per Foundation layer, World-Fade/Mute-Fade sliders, an optional World-ambience-track test row, and a Copy-as-Code panel rendering the exact FOUNDATION_LAYERS/fade-constant JS snippet to paste into js/audioManager.js once a mix is settled on. A real, load-bearing path bug was found and fixed while building this: FOUNDATION_BASE/WORLDS_BASE were bare relative paths, resolving against the page's URL -- correct at the project root, silently 404ing from the nested tools/audio-mixer/index.html, the same class of bug already fixed once for js/themeRepositoryClient.js's Supabase config path. Fixed identically via new URL('../assets/audio/',document.currentScript.src), anchored to this script's own file location. Verified end-to-end via Playwright: all 5 layer sliders, Master/World-Fade/Mute-Fade sliders, mute toggle, Copy-as-Code, and Reset-to-Defaults all work correctly; zero console errors on either the Mixer page or the main app. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to additive exports in js/audioManager.js (plus the path-resolution bugfix) and a new, standalone tools/audio-mixer/ folder.
